description:
Hey Guys,
In this video business lav explain, Health Insurance में इन बीमारियो पर Cover नहीं मिलता है । Health Insurance  Exclusions 2021 । Health Insurance explained

Which treatment is covered & not covered under mediclaim policy / common inclusion/exclusion from health insurance.
Health Insurance Me Kya Kya Cover Hota Hai & Kya Kya Cover Nahi Hota Hai।

1. First 30 days waiting period/Initial waiting period/cooling period 
2. Pre-existing diseases/Health Issue 
3. Specific waiting period 
4. General Exclusion 
5. Permanent exclusion 
6. Cosmetic surgery 
7. Eye & Dental Care, Hearing
8. Conditions related to Pregnancy, child birth, abortion, etc..
9. Does Health Insurance cover diagnostic charges like X-rays, MRI, or ultrasound 
10. Does Health Insurance cover Intentional self-injury 
11. Health Issue due to consumption of drug or alcohol 
12. Non-Allopathy Treatment covered under health insurance
13. Hospitalisation of the insured person, directly or indirectly due to War & foreign enimies
14. Unproven, untested, unconventional, experimental treatment
15. Dietary supplements bought without prescription is not covered

Follow our Official Facebook Page at :-
 https://www.facebook.com/businesslavk/

Instagram:
https://www.instagram.com/businesslav/

#BusinessLav
tags: which Illenss is not cover in health Insurance
How to buy best health Insurance
What are the diseases not covered by health insurance company
things to consider before buying any health insurance

comments.text:
Isi wajah se maine pahle ADITYA BIRLA HEALTH INSURANCE ka sara rules regulations padh kar samajh kar inki agency liya.....bcoz policy toh akhir apne jaan pahchan wale ka hi karunga na.....isliye pura terms conditions jaan kar hi inka agency code liya.....aaj 7months hone ko aya maine abhi tak 45 policies kar chuka hun...... Jismein se lagbhag 8 ya 9 logon ka claim ka jarurat pada..... And as because maine apne sare policyholders ka record acche se maintain kar rakha tha unke claim settlement Main as such koi problem nahin aaya...... Agar aapke pass sare documents proper hai, aur aapka case genuine hai..... To aapko claim Lene se koi bhi nahin rok Sakta..... 
That's why sabhi ko yahi Rai Dunga kya policy Kisi bhi company se len do chij hamesha Dhyan rakhiye 1) health insurance policy Ek reputed company ka ho 2) aapka Jo agent hai vah thorough knowledge wala Ho jiske pass theoretical aur practical dono knowledge Ho.....
Because claim ke waqt patient aur unke Ghar wale panic situation mein rahte hain us waqt Agent ko active hokar ke turant responsive hona chahie aur unke policy holders ke claim ko settlement karane ka pura vyavastha aur process karana chahie.....

Abhishek Verma 
Finance & Tax Consultant 
Insurance Expert 
9304075757

comments.text: Insurance in India is typically a scam. A common person who is not able to fight with insurance companies, cannot easily claim the amount. You will have one reason to get the amount and companies has thousand reason to reject. Eventually patient quits after rejection. Consumer rights are a laughable joke. Those who say you can file complaint to IRDAI, good for them.  Unless healthcare is not protected by Govt for the common man, Private companies will keep looting.
